about.title: About Me
about.intro: I am a Master's student in Artificial Intelligence and Business Analytics at Lingnan University, Hong Kong, with a Bachelor's degree in Computer Science (Software Engineering) from Carleton University, Canada. I have a solid foundation in full-stack development and specialize in AI technologies including large language models, RAG, and AI Agents.

ms.degree: Master of Science in Artificial Intelligence and Business Analytics

bs.degree: Bachelor of Computer Science (Software Engineering Stream)

strengths.title: Strengths & Focus Areas
items: AI/ML engineering and large language model applications
Data analysis, visualization, and business intelligence

gaitgpt.title: GaitGPT - AI-Powered Gait Analysis System
gaitgpt.problem: Developed an intelligent gait analysis system for medical assessment scenarios to make gait analysis accessible to non-technical users like rehabilitation therapists.
gaitgpt.data: Text and video inputs for gait analysis, integrated with medical knowledge base
gaitgpt.approach: Built GPT-based system with custom prompt engineering, RAG pipeline, and agent workflow control
gaitgpt.outcome: Enabled conversion of text/video to gait insights, report generation, and long-term memory storage
gaitgpt.contribution: Full-stack development including prompt engineering, backend API, and system integration

srr.title: SRR Agentic Case Processing System
srr.problem: Led development of enterprise-level AI processing system for engineering domain to automate multi-source document parsing and task routing.
srr.data: Engineering documents, geographic/meteorological data, slope management data
srr.approach: Built RAG pipeline with vector databases, integrated external APIs, designed AI Agent scheduling logic
srr.outcome: Automated engineering data processing with intelligent task routing and standardized output
srr.contribution: Core development including RAG pipeline, agent logic, and three-tier memory system

game.title: Multiplayer Online Web Game
game.problem: Developed real-time multiplayer web game to enhance user engagement through interactive gameplay.
game.data: Game state data, player interactions, real-time communication
game.approach: Spring Boot backend with WebSocket integration, responsive frontend with Bootstrap
game.outcome: Functional 2-4 player real-time game with smooth user experience
game.contribution: Full-stack development including game logic, real-time communication, and UI

resume.title: Resume / CV
resume.summaryText: Master's student in AI & Business Analytics with expertise in full-stack development and AI technologies. Experienced in building enterprise applications and implementing AI solutions in business scenarios.
